name: Gate Guardian of Thunder and Wind
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ゲート・ガーディアン
name_jp_tl: Devil of Thunder and Wind - Gate Guardian
desc:
"Sanga of the Thunder" + "Kazejin"
Must be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. During your Main Phase: You can add 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand that mentions "Sanga of the Thunder", "Kazejin", AND "Suijin". You can only use this effect of "Gate Guardian of Thunder and Wind" once per turn. If this face-up Special Summoned card in its owner's control leaves the field because of an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 of your banished "Sanga of the Thunder" or "Kazejin".

action: Activates if it leaves the field
summoning: Requires only specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
